# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

We actively support and patch the following versions of our software:

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| 1.0.x   | :white_check_mark: |
| < 1.0   | :x:                |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

We take the security of our services and software very seriously. If you believe you have found a security vulnerability, please report it to us immediately.

Please **do not** report security vulnerabilities via public GitHub issues. Instead, report them privately by emailing us at:

📧 **contacto@kvrva.com**

Please include the following information in your report:
- A description of the vulnerability and its potential impact.
- Detailed steps to reproduce the vulnerability (including code examples, requests, or screenshots if possible).
- Any details on how this issue might be mitigated.

Once we receive your report, we will:
- Acknowledge receipt of your report within 48 hours.
- Work to verify the vulnerability and determine its severity.
- Keep you updated on our progress as we develop a patch or mitigation.
- Give credit in our release notes once the patch is published (unless you request to remain anonymous).
